insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure compatibility with future versions.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and the block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility. The deprecation does not affect the functionality of existing extensions, but it is recommended to update them to avoid potential issues in the future. Developers can use alternative APIs or hooks to achieve the same functionality.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be directly affected by this deprecation, but they may experience issues if their checkout UI extensions are not updated to be compatible with the latest API version.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it ensures that checkout UI extensions are compatible with future API versions and do not break when the deprecated API is removed. It also encourages developers to update their extensions to use the latest APIs and best practices.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now reads disabled command metadata and preserves actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: New Hydrogen projects now include an explicit app alias, improving JavaScript project configuration.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton updated to include explicit app alias for new projects, aligning with Vite's native resolve behavior.
CLI version 4.5.0 released, including changes to store commands for public release.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support background extension targets, enabling event observation and background logic without UI rendering.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners introduced to enhance trust and confidence in the partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing updates include increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, affecting existing implementations.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow updates allow for more control over breaking changes to Action extensions, reducing validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, simplifying app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 released, including fixes for long URL wrapping and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements emphasize honest and transparent review practices for all published apps.

recap.headline: Hydrogen updates and Shopify platform enhancements

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, and skeleton@2026.4.5, which include improvements to command metadata, build errors, and JavaScript project configuration. These updates aim to enhance the development experience and stability of Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: Shopify Platform Enhancements
themes.detail: The Shopify platform introduced several enhancements, including support for background extensions in POS, identity verification for Shopify Partners, updates to App Pricing, and changes to POS UI extensions and Shopify Flow. These updates focus on improving security, flexibility, and control for developers and merchants.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest version of @shopify/cli-hydrogen and @shopify/create-hydrogen
Review and adapt to the new App Pricing changes, including increased plan limits and no-charge plan testing
Verify partner identity to ensure compliance with the new Shopify Partner ecosystem requirements
